text.title: Requirements Lifecycle Management Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml or to the universal skip-this-methodology conclusion.

conclusion.verdict: Run full state machine + multi-role change control + immutable version log.
Defer to story tracker; ensure tracker meets audit requirements first.
Reset state machine + audit prior transitions.
Forward-only transitions; backward-state edits require explicit rollback record.

example.description: When the situation matches the leading branch, apply the referenced rule; otherwise traverse to the next condition until the default branch is reached.
